name: Bank of America® Premium Rewards® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 60,000 online bonus points (a $600 value) after making at least $3,000 in purchases in the first 90 days.

earning_rates.notes: 2x points on travel purchases (directly-booked travel, airlines, hotels, etc.)

sources.notes: USCCG card review (LLM-friendly static HTML; BoA direct page is JS-rendered SPA returning unrendered template tokens to scrapers — caused 'All sources failed' on the 2026-05-09 dry-run)
Official BofA Rewards overview; credit card rewards bonus 10%-75% and tier mechanics. Verified 2026-06-13.
Bank of America newsroom announcement for 2026 BofA Rewards expansion.
Official eligible credit cards page; legacy Preferred Rewards bonus reference.

recurring_credits.name: Airline Incidental Statement Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 in annual statement credits for qualifying airline incidental purchases such as seat upgrades, baggage fees, in-flight services, and airline lounge fees.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 statement credit every four years for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fees charged to the card.

relationship_bonus.requirements: Eligible Bank of America deposit and Merrill investment balances determine tier. Credit-card rewards bonus is applied to eligible Bank of America credit cards; tier names/thresholds reflect the 2026 BofA Rewards transition and should be re-verified as terms settle.

notes: Premium Rewards has a $100 annual airline incidental credit plus Global Entry/TSA PreCheck credit every four years; relationship bonus is modeled separately from base earning rates.
